finding_results.notes: Replaced administrative abstraction with scene-bound physical and interpersonal risk beats, and each cited passage now lands on observable consequence or unresolved exposure rather than interpretive closure labels.

summary: All three structural/craft findings were addressed in-place in chapter_08 with targeted line-level revisions that preserve chapter continuity, intensify embodied consequence, and reduce mechanical stress-lexicon recurrence while keeping relational stakes explicit.
